title: Asia Centric: China’s Rise as the World’s First Electrostate
title_cn: 以亚洲为中心：中国崛起为世界第一个电极国家
summary: China is rewriting the global energy playbook, rapidly transforming into a clean energy powerhouse and emerging as the world’s first “electrostate”. While the Iran war has rattled global commodity markets, Beijing has successfully absorbed the shock due to a decade-long pivot toward domestic renewable energy. Now, it’s positioning itself to reap economic rewards by exporting its green infrastructure to the rest of the world.

title: Polymarket Bets on Iran Deal Fuel Fresh Insider-Trading Fears
title_cn: Polymarket 对伊朗交易的押注加剧了新的内幕交易担忧
summary: A Bloomberg analysis of several well-timed Polymarket bets with outsized profits reveals the risk of insider trading.

title: Tech Disruptors: Fiserv on Modern Banking’s Tech Stack
title_cn: 技术颠覆者：Fiserv 谈现代银行业的技术堆栈
summary: Artificial intelligence is reshaping banking infrastructure, from accelerating core migrations to enabling agentic experiences that can automate complex workflows. In this episode of Bloomberg Intelligence’s Tech Disruptors podcast, Vishal Dalal, chief product officer of financial solutions at Fiserv, joins BI fintech and payments analyst Diksha Gera to discuss how banks are using AI to modernize legacy systems and improve data quality while managing security, compliance and governance risks. Th

title: America 250 Festivities to Disrupt Flights at Washington Airport
title_cn: 美国 250 场庆祝活动导致华盛顿机场航班中断
summary: Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport, the closest commercial airport to the nation’s capital, is warning travelers to expect disruptions as it plans to temporarily close runways and slash operations at points throughout the summer to accommodate celebrations for the US’s 250th anniversary.

title: Bayer Wins Fight to Keep Roundup Settlement in Missouri
title_cn: 拜耳赢得了密苏里州农达解决方案的斗争
summary: Bayer AG won a legal fight that brings the company a step closer to getting Missouri state court approval for a proposed $7.25 billion settlement of thousands of US cancer lawsuits alleging Roundup weedkiller caused cancer.

title_cn: 特朗普：协议可能明天签署，克莱顿听证会推迟

title_cn: 报告：伊朗协议可能于今日签署，SpaceX 股价下跌，更多
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 5:36

title: Former OPEC President Cleared of Bribery by London Jury
title_cn: 伦敦陪审团宣告前欧佩克主席无贿赂罪
summary: Former Nigerian oil minister, Diezani Alison-Madueke, was cleared of all bribery charges following a London trial that lasted for five months.

title: Warsh Says FOMC Had 'Good Family Fight' on Fed Policy as Rates Stay Steady
title_cn: 沃什表示，随着利率保持稳定，联邦公开市场委员会在美联储政策上进行了“良好的家庭斗争”
summary: Andrew Szczurowski, strategic income portfolio manager at Morgan Stanley Investment Management, said that it is still to be determined if Kevin Warsh will follow through on hawkish signals he gave in his first press conference as Federal Reserve chair as the Fed held rates steady. Szczurowski, who was joined by Bloomberg Economy's Stuart Paul, said that despite the decision to hold rates, the FOMC remains very divided as members disagree on the direction the Fed should take interest rates.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Barings’ High-Yield Playbook in a Warsh-Led Fed Era
title_cn: 巴林银行在沃什领导的美联储时代的高收益策略
summary: Kelly Burton, High Yield Portfolio Manager at Barings, discussed the current dynamics in the high-yield credit market, emphasizing strong institutional demand for double B and single B rated credits with yields between 6-8%. Despite elevated yields expected to persist regardless of Federal Reserve actions, Burton noted a complex macroeconomic environment influenced by inflationary pressures, partly driven by geopolitical tensions such as the Iran conflict and high oil prices. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース
title_cn: 【今早5篇】精选上班前必读新闻
summary: FOMC利上げ巡り予想割れる、イラン合意への批判一蹴、小泉防衛相、レアアース巡り合意、依存ゼロに

title: Trump Says US, Israel Have 'Little Dispute Over Lebanon'
title_cn: 特朗普称美国和以色列“在黎巴嫩问题上几乎没有争议”
summary: US President Donald Trump, speaking at the Group of Seven leaders meeting in Evian, France, says he and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu "have a little dispute over Lebanon." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dollar Steamrolls Peers as Fed Opens Door for 2026 Rate Hike
title_cn: 美联储开启 2026 年加息之门，美元大幅上涨
summary: The dollar capped its best day in more than three months as traders rushed to buy the US currency after Federal Reserve officials signaled growing support for interest-rate hikes this year.

title: BOJ Will Hike Rates Again by December, Says 90% of Economists
title_cn: 90% 的经济学家表示，日本央行将在 12 月之前再次加息
summary: An overwhelming majority of Bank of Japan watchers anticipate the central bank will raise interest rates again by the end of this year, following a hike to the highest level since 1995 earlier this week, according to a Bloomberg survey.

title: Brazilian Nickel Seeks Anchor Investor for $1.4 Billion Mine
title_cn: 巴西镍矿寻求主要投资者购买 14 亿美元的矿山
summary: Brazilian Nickel Ltd. is seeking an anchor investor to help attract more equity funding for its planned $1.4 billion nickel and cobalt mine in northeastern Brazil.

title: Fmr. Fed Vice Chair Blinder on FOMC Decision, Inflation
title_cn: 先生。美联储副主席布林德谈联邦公开市场委员会决策、通胀
summary: Alan Blinder, former Federal Reserve Vice Chair and current professor at Princeton University, provided insights on the Federal Reserve's newly outlined five task forces, emphasizing the market's keen interest in the Fed's communications strategy and its approach to using existing economic data. Blinder clarified that while the Fed produces some data such as industrial production and interest rates, most critical economic indicators like inflation, unemployment, and GDP come from other statistical agencies. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BlackRock's Rosenberg Warns About Overplaying the Flattening Yield Curve
title_cn: 贝莱德的罗森伯格警告不要过度发挥收益率曲线的平坦化
summary: Jeffrey Rosenberg, portfolio manager of the systematic multi-strategy fund at BlackRock, reacts to the Federal Reserve's decision to keep rates unchanged and says there's a risk of overplaying the flattening yield curve. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oaktree Private Credit Fund Redemptions Drop Below Key 5% Limit
title_cn: 橡树私人信贷基金赎回跌破 5% 的关键限额
summary: An Oaktree Capital Management private credit fund saw redemption requests drop by nearly half in the second quarter, making it the first major firm to stem a growing exodus from the $1.8 trillion industry.

title: Stocks Fall as Traders See Fed Hike by October: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 交易员预计美联储十月加息，股市下跌：市场总结
summary: Wall Street traders sent stocks lower as short-dated bond yields climbed after the Federal Reserve signaled the possibility of higher rates as it assesses the impacts of the Iran war on inflation.

title: Wall Street Revives Risky Loan Deals Banks Couldn’t Sell
title_cn: 华尔街重启银行无法出售的高风险贷款交易
summary: Wall Street banks are looking to make the most of rising demand for risky debt with a raft of leveraged loan sales that they previously couldn’t sell.

title: SpaceX Shares Fall for First Time Since Blockbuster Debut
title_cn: SpaceX 股价自重磅上市以来首次下跌
summary: SpaceX shares declined for the first time since its record initial public offering, snapping a three-day rally that had reached nearly 50%.

title: WNBA's Dallas Wings Reaping Benefits From Draft Choices
title_cn: WNBA 达拉斯翼队从选秀选择中获益
summary: The WNBA's Dallas Wings are reaping benefits in the standings and on their books from having back-to-back No. 1 draft choices, improving their won-loss record and boosting ticket revenue, according to Chief Executive Officer Greg Bibb. He speaks with Bloomberg's Julie Fine. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Yen Slides to Weakest Level Versus Dollar Since July 2024
title_cn: 日元兑美元跌至 2024 年 7 月以来最低水平
summary: The yen slumped to its weakest level against the US dollar since July 2024, raising the risk of official intervention to prop it up.

title: ASML CEO Sees Musk’s Terafab as Test for Supply Lines
title_cn: ASML首席执行官将马斯克的Terafab视为供应线的测试
summary: ASML Holding NV Chief Executive Officer Christophe Fouquet said the chip equipment maker has to make sure it doesn’t experience supply constraints when servicing new projects such as Elon Musk’s Terafab.

title: LIV CEO Lays Out Plans To Keep League Alive
title_cn: LIV 首席执行官制定了保持联盟活力的计划
summary: Scott O'Neil, CEO of LIV Golf, joins Dani Burger and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." LIV Golf has begun laying the groundwork for a potential US bankruptcy filing if it fails to raise new funds, according to people familiar with the matter. The golf league is currently looking for money after its main backer, the Saudi Public Investment Fund, pulled its funding. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Falls as Hawkish Fed Stokes 2026 Interest-Rate Hike Wagers
title_cn: 鹰派美联储引发 2026 年加息押注，金价下跌
summary: Gold fell after Federal Reserve officials left interest rates unchanged while signaling the possibility of higher rates later this year as the central bank gauges the inflation effects of the Iran conflict.

title: J&J Has No Plans to Enter Obesity Drugs Market, CEO Says
title_cn: 首席执行官表示强生没有计划进入肥胖药物市场
summary: Johnson & Johnson has no plans to enter the booming obesity market, opting instead to focus on diseases such as cancer, CEO Joaquin Duato said in an interview for an upcoming episode of The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations. The comments set J&J apart from many of its rivals that are trying to develop or acquire obesity medicines following blockbuster weight-loss drugs from Eli Lilly & Co. and Novo Nordisk.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Ticks Higher as Traders Await Signing of US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 交易员等待美伊协议签署，油价走高
summary: Oil ticked up after two days of stark declines, with prices still broadly pressured by a pending interim peace deal between the US and Iran that could reopen the Strait of Hormuz and send millions of barrels back to the market.

title: Traders Fully Price in a Rate Hike by October on Hawkish Fed
title_cn: 交易员充分消化了鹰派美联储十月份加息的影响
summary: Short-dated US Treasury yields leaped as Federal Reserve officials signaled they expect an interest-rate hike in the coming months, pushing traders to fully price in higher borrowing costs by October.

title: Fed's Warsh Says He Doesn't Think Submitting Dots Is Helpful
title_cn: 美联储沃什表示，他认为提交点没有帮助
summary: Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh says his colleagues have been "very open" about changes during a news conference after the Fed decided to leave rate unchanged. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: PE Must Be Proactive to Drive Transactions: Bain's Gordon
title_cn: 贝恩公司戈登：私募股权公司必须积极主动推动交易
summary: Chris Gordon, co-head of the global private equity at Bain Capital, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Seeking to Raise $300M, Create Unique Structure: LIV CEO
title_cn: LIV 首席执行官：寻求筹集 3 亿美元，创建独特的结构
summary: Scott O'Neil, CEO of LIV Golf, joins Dani Burger and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." LIV Golf has begun laying the groundwork for a potential US bankruptcy filing if it fails to raise new funds, according to people familiar with the matter. The golf league is currently looking for money after its main backer, the Saudi Public Investment Fund, pulled its funding. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: War Drains Oil Inventories to Critically Low Level at US Hub
title_cn: 战争使美国中心的石油库存降至极低水平
summary: Customers desperate for oil are draining so much of it from giant storage tanks in Oklahoma that producers are having trouble keeping up.

title: Fed Getting US Ready for Rate Hikes, JPMorgan's Michele Says
title_cn: 摩根大通的米歇尔表示，美联储正在为加息做好准备
summary: Bob Michele, JPMorgan Asset Management's global head of fixed income, says the Federal Reserve's policy-setting Federal Open Market Committee is showing a hawkish tilt after its decision to leave rates unchanged. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance: The Fed Decides." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bass Pro Shops Is Buying a Luxury Florida Keys Fishing Lodge
title_cn: Bass Pro Shops 正在购买佛罗里达群岛的豪华钓鱼小屋
summary: Outdoor retailer Bass Pro Shops is buying a historic fishing lodge in the Florida Keys, adding another luxury hotel to its growing portfolio.

title: Stellantis Is in Talks With Two Possible Partners for Maserati
title_cn: Stellantis 正在与玛莎拉蒂的两个可能的合作伙伴进行谈判
summary: Stellantis NV Chief Executive Officer Antonio Filosa said the company is in talks with two potential partners for Maserati, which will have implications for the plants producing the ailing luxury’s brand’s cars.

title: Fed's Warsh 'Destined to Disappoint' Trump, JPMorgan's Michele Says
title_cn: 摩根大通的米歇尔表示，美联储的沃什“注定会让特朗普失望”
summary: "We have to accept the economy is in pretty good shape," Bob Michele, JPMorgan Asset Management's global head of fixed income, says during an interview on "Bloomberg Surveillance: The Fed Decides." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Billions in SpaceX IPO Arb Trades Rattle ETFs Including ARKK
title_cn: SpaceX IPO Arb 交易 Rattle ETF 价值数十亿美元，其中包括 ARKK
summary: A series of unusual multibillion-dollar flows has rippled through the exchange-traded fund market in the past week, suggesting some major investors used a contentious method to get exposure to the initial public offering of SpaceX. At least one fund manager placed temporary restrictions on its product in a bid to curb the practice.

title: US Looks to Expand Nuclear Power as AI Drives Up Energy Demand
title_cn: 人工智能推高能源需求，美国寻求扩大核电
summary: Ho K. Nieh, chair of the US Nuclear Regulatory Committee, said that the NRC has taken 'major steps' to reform its framework for licensing nuclear plants and how it conducts regulatory checks as the Trump administration looks to increase the amount of nuclear energy projects in the United States. Nieh said that despite reforms the NRC remains a 'strong regulator' and could not yet reveal which regulations were under review.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fmr. FDIC Chair Bair: Warsh Gets A+ for 1st Fed Meeting
title_cn: 先生。 FDIC 主席拜尔：沃什在第一次美联储会议上获得 A+
summary: Sheila Bair, former FDIC Chair and Senior Fellow at the Center for Financial Stability, shared her assessment of Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh's first meeting and press conference. Bair commended Warsh for his measured and judicious communication, particularly his firm commitment to price stability and cautious approach to economic projections. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Can Musk Pull Off a SpaceX-Tesla Merger?
title_cn: 马斯克能否完成 SpaceX 与特斯拉的合并？
summary: Should Elon Musk merge SpaceX and Tesla, into one company? There’s huge conflicts of interest here, Bloomberg Opinion columnist Liam Denning says. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Prepares Second-Generation iPhone Air for Spring 2027
title_cn: Apple 为 2027 年春季推出第二代 iPhone Air
summary: Apple Inc. is preparing a second-generation iPhone Air for spring 2027, aiming to boost the appeal of the slimmed-down device, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Anthropic Gets A Warning, SpaceX Shares Fall on Fourth Day | Bloomberg Tech 6/17/2026
title_cn: Anthropic 收到警告，SpaceX 股价连续第四天下跌彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 17 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow discusses US Commerce Secretary's warning to Anthropic that it needs government permission to grant foreign nationals access to the company's most advanced AI models. Plus, after three days of soaring, SpaceX shares come back down to Earth and drop for the first time on the company's fourth trading day. And, Bloomberg reports Apple's upcoming camera-equipped AirPods will launch in late 2027 as part of a flurry of new releases.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Orbital Data Centers Face Real Challenges, Says Peridot
title_cn: Peridot 表示，轨道数据中心面临真正的挑战
summary: Makenzie Lystrup, principal consultant at Peridot Services and former director for the Goddard Space Flight Center, NASA's primary hub for building and operating scientific satellites, says energy and heat present real challenges for orbital data centers and SpaceX ambitions. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple to Launch Camera Airpods, Foldable iPhone in 2027
title_cn: 苹果将​​于 2027 年推出带摄像头的 Airpods 和可折叠 iPhone
summary: Apple is holding steady with its AI ambitions, planning camera-equipped AirPods, smart glasses and new foldable iPhones as part of a major product push over the next two years. Plus: Snap introduces Specs, a pair of augmented reality glasses that co-founder Evan Spiegel described as a 'leapfrog advancement' and the computer of the future. Bloomberg's Mark Gurman joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Challenges for Radio Communication in Space
title_cn: 太空无线电通信面临的挑战
summary: Elon Musk wants to put data centers in space starting in 2028, but space presents challenges for compute, including communication between satellites and the ground. Dan Roelker, former head of software engineering at SpaceX, set out to address this problem when he co-founded Observable Space. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Capital Factory CEO Killed in Private-Jet Crash in Texas
title_cn: Capital Factory 首席执行官在德克萨斯州私人飞机失事中丧生
summary: Joshua Baer, the founder and chief executive officer of the venture capital firm Capital Factory, died Tuesday in a plane crash in South Texas, the Austin American-Statesman reported.

title: AI Health Startup Wants to Assist Half of Latin American Doctors
title_cn: 人工智能健康初创公司希望帮助一半的拉丁美洲医生
summary: An Andreessen Horowitz-backed healthcare startup born in Latin America wants to put its AI assistant in the hands of half the region’s 1.9 million doctors by the end of 2027, a bet that technology can help bridge a shortage of medical professionals across strained health systems.

title: Goldman Tops $1 Trillion in M&A Deals, Fastest to Reach the Mark
title_cn: 高盛并购交易额突破 1 万亿美元，创最快纪录
summary:
Goldman Sachs has already advised on more than $1 trillion of mergers and acquisitions so far this year, the fastest any bank has ever reached the milestone. Stephan Feldgoise runs the team and says it's been an intense first half, driven by big deals. He speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest."
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Macron Seeks Way Around Trump’s Ban on Anthropic’s AI Models
title_cn: 马克龙寻求绕过特朗普对 Anthropic 人工智能模型的禁令
summary: French President Emmanuel Macron led talks with Group of Seven leaders and tech executives to explore how to deploy the most advanced artificial intelligence models through so-called trusted partners, after the US blocked foreign nationals from accessing the technology.

title: Gen Z Wants Tech Without AI
title_cn: Z 世代想要没有人工智能的技术
summary: Cyberdecks, iPods and distraction-free devices are finding a new audience. Bloomberg Opinion columnist Catherine Thorbecke explores the growing appeal of anti-AI tech. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BioNTech Investor Förtsch Says Founders’ Spinout Raises Concerns
title_cn: BioNTech 投资者 Förtsch 表示创始人的分拆引发了担忧
summary: German media mogul and investor Bernd Förtsch is calling on BioNTech SE to provide more details on the planned departure of its founders and the transfer of assets to their new venture.

title: France Adopts Law to Ease EDF Grip on Hydropower Market, Spur Investment on New Generation Capacity
title_cn: 法国通过法律放松法国电力公司对水电市场的控制，刺激对新一代发电能力的投资
summary: The French Parliament adopted a bill to loosen Electricite de France SA’s grip on the hydropower market, a move aimed at ending a spat with the European Union and unlocking billions of euros in investment for new generation capacity.

title: VSCO Challenges Adobe With New App and a $500 Plan for Pros
title_cn: VSCO 向 Adob​​e 发起新应用挑战，并为专业人士提供 500 美元计划
summary: VSCO, the photography platform best known for its popular image filters, is introducing a more advanced iOS app and an all-in-one subscription plan, moves that put it in direct competition with Adobe Inc. and other brands offering professional-grade creative software.

title: US Order on Anthropic Models Signals New Era for AI Controls
title_cn: 美国对人择模型的命令标志着人工智能控制的新时代
summary: The confusing matter of Mythos.

title: ASML CEO on AI Demand, Data Centers in Space and Musk's Terafab
title_cn: ASML 首席执行官谈人工智能需求、太空数据中心和马斯克的 Terafab
summary: ASML Holding NV CEO Christophe Fouquet says the demand for AI infrastructure is still "enormous" and discusses the potential for data centers in space. Speaking during an interview on Bloomberg Television, Fouquet also says the company has to make sure it doesn’t experience supply constraints when servicing new projects such as on Elon Musk’s Terafab. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CarMax, JBL Shares Move on Earnings | Stock Movers
title_cn: CarMax 和 JBL 股价上涨 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- La-Z-Boy (LZB) shares are higher after the home furniture store’s reported adjusted earnings per share for the fourth quarter beat the average analyst estimate.

- CarMax (KMX) shares are moving after it reported net sales & operating revenue for the first quarter that beat the average analyst estimate.

- Jabil Inc. (JBL) shares rose as much as 14%, the most intraday since April 2025, after the manufacturing services firm reported third-quarter revenue that beat the average analyst estimate. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank Scales Back Latin America Tech Bets as Venture Capital Boom Fades
title_cn: 随着风险投资热潮的消退，软银缩减了对拉丁美洲科技的投资
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. is struggling to find startups in Latin America ready for major investments, underscoring how sharply the tech boom there has cooled since attracting record levels of venture capital only a few years ago.

title: BofA Public Finance Head Sees AI Boosting Underwriting Dominance
title_cn: 美国银行公共财务主管认为人工智能将提升承保主导地位
summary: Matthew McQueen, who oversees Bank of America Corp.’s public finance department, is looking to artificial intelligence to expand the bank’s underwriting business across the country.

title: SpaceX Adds $1 Trillion in Value Since IPO
title_cn: 自 IPO 以来 SpaceX 市值增加 1 万亿美元
summary: SpaceX has rapidly added $1 trillion in market capitalization since its recent public debut, reaching approximately $2.7 trillion and positioning itself as the fifth largest company globally, close to overtaking Microsoft. Mandeep Singh has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman's Kaplan on Fed's Warsh and AI Capex Boom
title_cn: 高盛的卡普兰谈美联储的 Warsh 和人工智能资本支出繁荣
summary: Robert Kaplan, Goldman Sachs vice chair and former Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas president, expects Federal Reserve's Kevin Warsh to adopt a more neutral tone in his first news conference as chair. Speaking on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Kaplan also says he sees an "historic" capital expenditures boom in the US. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic CEO Amodei on Compute Spend, Surpassing OpenAI
title_cn: Anthropic 首席执行官 Amodei 谈计算支出超越 OpenAI
summary: Emily Chang sits down with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei in a wide-ranging interview discussing his San Francisco roots, the race against OpenAI, the explosion of compute power, the Pentagon standoff and AI’s endgame. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Latest on Allbirds’ Abrupt Pivot to AI: a New Name and CEO
title_cn: Allbirds 突然转向人工智能的最新消息：新名称和首席执行官
summary: Allbirds Inc., the maker of once-viral wool sneakers that suddenly announced a pivot to artificial intelligence earlier this year, has officially renamed itself Smartbird Inc. and is tapping the former leader of a Danish AI infrastructure group as its new chief.

title: Apple Investors Are Tired of AI Promises, Want Tangible Progress
title_cn: 苹果投资者厌倦了人工智能承诺，希望取得切实进展
summary: Apple Inc. investors are losing patience with the company’s talk about becoming a more formidable presence in artificial intelligence and want to start seeing some results.

title: Snubbing Nvidia for Adobe Costs Florida Stock-Picker $50 Billion
title_cn: Adobe 冷落 Nvidia 使佛罗里达选股者损失 500 亿美元
summary: It was 180 degrees off the hot trade on Wall Street.

title: Google’s Gemini-Powered AI Home Speaker Goes on Sale June 25
title_cn: 谷歌 Gemini 驱动的人工智能家庭音箱将于 6 月 25 日上市
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google said that its Google Home Speaker, a $100 device that includes deep integration with the company’s Gemini artificial intelligence platform, will be available starting June 25.

title: Trump Defends Iran Deal, Hints at Early Signing
title_cn: 特朗普捍卫伊朗协议，暗示将提前签署
summary: President Donald Trump defended the interim peace deal he’s reached with Iran and said it could get signed as soon as tomorrow, amid pushback from Republicans who object to the deal and the billions of dollars set to flow Tehran’s way.

title: Inside the Chaotic Iran Talks That Let Trump Claim Victory, But Not Yet Peace
title_cn: 混乱的伊朗谈判让特朗普声称胜利，但尚未实现和平
summary: The result of weeks of intense diplomacy, the interim agreement between the US and Iran puts off many of the thorniest issues.

title: Housing Bill Deal Reached in Congress After Long Standoff
title_cn: 长期僵局后国会达成住房法案协议
summary: Leaders in the US House and Senate announced a deal Tuesday on a sweeping housing bill, ending a months-long standoff between the chambers over competing versions of the measure. Kailey Leinz breaks it down. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic-US Divide Poised to Give Tech Firms a Road Map
title_cn: 人类与美国的分歧将为科技公司提供路线图
summary: Restricting AI models over national security concerns suggests an end to the Trump administration’s hands-off approach to the technology.

title: ‘I Was Never a Leftist,’ Lula Says in G7 Chat Caught on Camera
title_cn: 卢拉在镜头捕捉到的七国集团聊天中说道：“我从来都不是左派”
summary: Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva rose from the trade union movement to define the Latin American left for a generation. But during a casual exchange on the sidelines of the G7 summit in France, the Brazilian president offered a different account of himself.

title: Fed Holds Rates Steady As Warsh Takes Helm: Fed Special
title_cn: 沃什上任后美联储维持利率稳定：美联储特别报告
summary:
Bloomberg's Scarlet Fu and Lisa Abramowicz discuss remarks from Fed Chair Kevin Warsh following the Federal Reserve's latest policy decision on a special edition of Bloomberg Surveillance. Federal Reserve officials left interest rates unchanged and were split over whether they expect to raise rates this year.
Policymakers’ new projections indicated nine officials foresee at least one quarter-point hike this year, with six anticipating at least two. Another nine expected no move or a cut. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He Can Understand Canada’s Chinese EV Import Cap
title_cn: 特朗普表示他可以理解加拿大的中国电动汽车进口上限
summary: President Donald Trump is happy with Canada’s arrangement to allow a capped number of Chinese electric vehicles to be imported at a low-tariff rate, Prime Minister Mark Carney said.

title: Trump Says He’d Rather Not Have USMCA, Teasing Termination
title_cn: 特朗普表示他宁愿没有美墨加协定，并戏弄终止
summary: President Donald Trump said he would rather the US not be a part of the US-Mexico-Canada trilateral trade pact, but sent mixed signals about an upcoming renewal deadline and stopped short of threatening outright to quit.

title: US Details, Defends 14-Point Iran Plan It Has Yet to Publish
title_cn: 美国详细捍卫尚未公布的 14 点伊朗计划
summary: Senior US officials outlined and defended the contours of a 14-point deal between the US and Iran to kick-start broader peace talks between the two countries, injecting more clarity around a plan that has been shrouded in secrecy.

title: UK Cabinet Pushes Starmer to Increase Defense Spending Amid Row
title_cn: 英国内阁敦促斯塔默增加国防开支
summary: Some UK cabinet ministers are pushing Prime Minister Keir Starmer and his chancellor of the Exchequer, Rachel Reeves, to increase defense funding further, following John Healey’s resignation over the spending row.

title: Fed Chairman Warsh Vows to Deliver Price Stability
title_cn: 美联储主席沃什誓言保持物价稳定
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh vows the committee will deliver price stability. In his first press conference leading the Fed, Warsh said there was “rigorous debate” before members voted to keep rates unchanged. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Sees Iran Deal by Friday | Balance of Power 6/17/2026
title_cn: 特朗普在周五之前看到伊朗协议权力平衡 6/17/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss President Trump's press conference at the G7 Summit in France. On today's show, Republican Senator Bill Hagerty of Tennessee and Groundwork Collaborative Senior Fellow Kitty Richards. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FTC Sues Nonprofit Alleging Deception Over Youth Trans Care
title_cn: 联邦贸易委员会起诉非营利组织，指控其在青少年跨性别护理方面存在欺骗行为
summary: The US Federal Trade Commission and several states sued the leading professional association focused on transgender healthcare Wednesday, alleging the group deceived parents about the medical necessity and safety of medical transitions.

title: Georgia GOP Drops Plans to Redraw Maps During Special Session
title_cn: 佐治亚州共和党在特别会议期间放弃重新绘制地图的计划
summary: Georgia House Republicans are shelving plans to redraw congressional and legislative districts, halting an effort that could have reshaped the state’s political maps for 2028.

title: World Cup Matches and UFC Fights Help European Leaders Placate Trump
title_cn: 世界杯比赛和 UFC 比赛帮助欧洲领导人安抚特朗普
summary: Hosting his very last Group of Seven summit, Emmanuel Macron needed every base covered to make sure it was a success and he came prepared.

title: Fed Leaves Rates Unchanged, Projections Over Hikes Are Split
title_cn: 美联储维持利率不变，加息预测存在分歧
summary: The Federal Open Market Committee voted unanimously to leave its benchmark interest rate in a target range of 3.5%-3.75%. Policymakers were split over whether they expect to raise rates this year. This is the first decision issued under Chair Kevin Warsh. Bloomberg's Michael McKee reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Erases Another $765 Million in Offshore Wind Leases
title_cn: 特朗普又取消了 7.65 亿美元的海上风电租赁
summary: The Trump administration is canceling four offshore wind leases held by power developer Invenergy LLC that total $765 million, the latest move by the White House to block new offshore wind development.

title: Cameroon Distances Itself From Vessel Intercepted by UK Marines
title_cn: 喀麦隆与英国海军陆战队拦截的船只保持距离
summary: Cameroon has distanced itself from an oil vessel flying its flag, which was tracked and intercepted in the English Channel by UK defense forces at the weekend.

title: World Cup, America 250 Face New Risk With Spy Law Lapse
title_cn: 世界杯、美国250强队面临间谍法失效的新风险
summary: A controversial spy powers law has become the latest political casualty of President Donald Trump’s second term, injecting uncertainty into US intelligence gathering in a summer dominated by the World Cup and high-profile events celebrating the country’s 250th anniversary.

title: UK Opposition Leader Badenoch on Economic Agenda, By-Election
title_cn: 英国反对党领袖巴德诺克谈经济议程和补选
summary: UK Opposition Leader Kemi Badenoch sat down with Bloomberg's Lizzy Burden to discuss Conservative policies on investment, bonds, oil and gas, and public spending. The interview comes ahead of the closely watched Makerfield by-election in Greater Manchester, seen as an important gauge of public sentiment. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Badenoch Sets Out Conservative Reforms to Make UK ‘Investable’
title_cn: 巴德诺克提出保守改革以使英国“可投资”
summary: Conservative leader Kemi Badenoch will set out plans to make the UK “investable” in a speech Thursday in the City of London designed to help revive the flagging fortunes of Parliament’s main opposition party.

title: Ethiopia’s Ruling Party on Track for Poll Win, Early Count Shows
title_cn: 早期计票显示埃塞俄比亚执政党有望赢得民意调查
summary: Ethiopia’s ruling party is on course to win June 1 elections, cementing Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed’s hold on power.

title: Trump Restores Pacific Command Name, Raising Strategy Questions
title_cn: 特朗普恢复太平洋司令部名称，引发战略问题
summary: The Pentagon said it’s changing the name of its Indo-Pacific Command back to the US Pacific Command, unwinding a branding change made during President Donald Trump’s first term, a move analysts suggest could reflect a shift in how the US frames its strategy toward Asia.

title: Netherlands Pledges $580 Million for Weapons for Ukraine
title_cn: 荷兰承诺向乌克兰提供 5.8 亿美元武器
summary: The Netherlands pledged €500 million ($580 million) in weapons support for Ukraine, Dutch Defense Minister Dilan Yeşilgöz-Zegerius said Wednesday.

title: Russian Gasoline Prices Skyrocket as Ukraine Strikes Refineries
title_cn: 乌克兰袭击炼油厂，俄罗斯汽油价格飙升
summary: Russian gasoline prices advanced further, with drivers in the summer vacation season facing headaches after some filling stations across the nation limited sales due to Ukrainian attacks on refineries.

title: Healthy Food May Be Exempt in New Ultra-Processed Definition
title_cn: 健康食品可能不受新的超加工定义的影响
summary: The Trump administration is expected to create an exemption in its definition of ultra-processed foods for “healthy” items and for infant formulas, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: US Senate Postpones Spy Chief Hearing as Trump Demands Delay
title_cn: 由于特朗普要求推迟，美国参议院推迟了间谍首席听证会
summary: President Donald Trump forced the Senate to postpone the Wednesday confirmation hearing for Jay Clayton as his next intelligence director amid a wider spat with congressional Republicans over the Iran peace deal and other matters.

title: What We Know About Iran’s Nuclear Program
title_cn: 我们对伊朗核计划的了解
summary: Iran has faced suspicion for decades over its nuclear ambitions and whether it’s developing the capability to build an atomic weapon. While the Islamic Republic has always maintained that its nuclear program is peaceful and for energy purposes, that claim has been met with skepticism by the US and its allies.

title:
AI Bosses Meet G7 Leaders as US Curbs
Unsettle Allies
title_cn:
美国限制人工智能大佬会见七国集团领导人
令盟友不安
summary:
Tech leaders including CEOs of OpenAI and Anthropic joined G7 leaders in France for talks on AI.

It comes as US allies reel from the Trump administration's decision to curb access to Anthropic's most powerful models. Tyler Kendall explains. (Source: Bloomberg)
